title: A theory I have about the First Ancestral Race
display_title: A theory I have about the First Ancestral Race
wikitext:
[]: A theory I have about the First Ancestral Race             Quote Post by RedMeteor » Mon Jun 03, 2013 2:51 pm So, the story says that the first ancestral race created the seeds of life, but made them so that if both landed on the same planet, they would destroy the race living on it, because that race would gain the same great power that the first ancestral race had. So I was thinking, what if the ancestral race was constituted by eva units? By this, I mean that when they existed, the First Ancestral Race was anatomically made like unarmored evangelion units. Nerv is actually recreating the FAR bodies, following the dead sea scrolls. I have some points to "prove" this: - eva units started being produced after both of the seeds were awake on earth, meaning that now it was possible to have the power of the ancestral race on earth. - eva units are the only ones capable of destroying an angel, meaning that, very much likely the ancestral race, they can subdue them. - (far fetched speculation) In 3.33, when the third impact occurs, everyone turns into red eva units and then loses the head: why? Because the ancestral race, that wanted to make sure to destroy all life in that planet, engineered the impact to occur in such a way that every living being would turn into the only form they knew how to kill for sure, themselves, eva units. I know it's half-assed, but i wanted to share this theory with you guys. Thoughts? Also sorry for bad english.

[]:             Quote Post by Coblat » Mon Jun 03, 2013 3:03 pm I actually remember seeing a deviantART picture showing a possible design for a FAR being and thinking how incredibly plausible it looked. As far as how your idea sounds, I don't have much to add to it other than "anything is possible in Eva." I honestly just think the FAR theory sounds very interesting, and hope it's incorporated into 4.44 and/or future Rebuild films if there happened to be any.

[]:             Quote Post by RedMeteor » Mon Jun 03, 2013 3:08 pm Yeah, if it is ever incorporated I'll let everyone know that I called it

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Jun 03, 2013 4:03 pm A key component of their technology is the ability to extricate the individual from a physical form, so they probably used artificial/constructed bodies and reproduced asexually if at all by the time they reached the height of their civilization. They may have come to the end of their own path and willingly merged into a single entity ala Instrumentality, and designed their exoforming/life seeding machines to prevent their creations from doing the same.

[]:             Quote Post by RedMeteor » Mon Jun 03, 2013 4:29 pm I prefer to imagine them as actual eva shaped living beings, rather than some sort of perfect fluid. Just because they could extricate the individual from the phisical form, it doesn't mean that they did so to themselves

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 03, 2013 4:37 pm RedMeteor wrote: Yeah, if it is ever incorporated I'll let everyone know that I called it

[]:             Quote Post by RedMeteor » Mon Jun 03, 2013 4:45 pm Reichu wrote: I've been saying that the FAR looked like Evas for years now.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Jun 03, 2013 6:50 pm It has long been my belief an Eva-like (read: Human) body was the natural form of the First Ancestral Race. However as they had both fruits, like the Angels they would be able to redefine it if they liked.

[]:             Quote Post by RedMeteor » Mon Jun 03, 2013 7:01 pm Ok, i was arguing in another thread with this guy and he shredded my theory to pieces. I came up with this theory while trying to make sense of the consequences the third impact had in 3.33, and it all made sense in my head. Lol i want answers so badly that i come up with this stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jun 03, 2013 7:14 pm I dunno, we never learn much about the FAR in NGE and we are never told very much about what they looked like. Although, if they possessed both Fruits, would they have a core, like Evas and Angels, or would both their Fruits be somehow bonded to their bodies on a metaphysical level (like the Fruit of Knowledge, which is in every human but does not require a core).

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Jun 03, 2013 7:35 pm Speculating about the creators of Adam and Lilith looking like Evas or having cores would be like ants speculating that humans look like gigantic shoes and brooms.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jun 03, 2013 7:38 pm Reichu wrote: I've been saying that the FAR looked like Evas for years now.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 03, 2013 7:44 pm Monk Ed wrote: Or was it just that they were human-sized and human-like (as in technological and lacking such things as eternal life or superpowers)?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jun 03, 2013 8:15 pm Reichu wrote: Basically mini-Evas, maybe approximately human size. Who knows exactly how big. And, yeah, Fruit of Knowledge only. FAR having both doesn't make sense to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 03, 2013 8:23 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: If they only had the FoK, how did they get enough power to create the SoLs and LoLs?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jun 03, 2013 9:07 pm Reichu wrote: Is there any particular reason that the Seeds and Spears -- not to mention the S2 Engine itself -- couldn't be the product of Sufficiently Advanced Technology?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 03, 2013 9:10 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: In that case the FAR could just be very advanced humans, then, without any Eva-like characteristics.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jun 03, 2013 9:18 pm Ahh, gotcha. I suppose that is very likely, "God made man in His own image" and all that. Although I think it would be ironic if they were actually humans or humanoid beings and created the Seeds to save their race from extinction in a parallel of Nerv creating the Evas. But from a scientific standpoint your argument is more likely.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 03, 2013 9:30 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: Although I think it would be ironic if they were actually humans or humanoid beings and created the Seeds to save their race from extinction

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Jun 03, 2013 10:44 pm Reichu wrote: Basically mini-Evas, maybe approximately human size. Who knows exactly how big. And, yeah, Fruit of Knowledge only. FAR having both doesn't make sense to me.
